name: TradesViz
description_short: Feature-rich web trading journal with free stock journaling, dashboards, imports, replay, simulators, AI Q&A and advanced analytics.
description_long:
TradesViz is a feature-rich web trading journal for active traders who want dashboards, imports, reporting and advanced analysis in one place. The current product positioning includes free stock journaling, paid Pro and Platinum plans, custom dashboards, trade and day plans, simulators, replay, backtesting, options flow and AI Q&A.

That breadth makes TradesViz a strong fit for traders who want more than a simple logbook. It can act as a performance dashboard, replay environment and analysis cockpit across stocks, options, futures, forex and prop-firm workflows. The tradeoff is complexity: the same depth that makes TradesViz powerful can feel busy for traders who only need a lightweight journal.

TradesViz is best evaluated as a modern web-based trading analysis platform rather than a basic spreadsheet replacement. Traders who want privacy-first desktop storage may prefer TradingDiary Pro, while traders who want a browser-based journal with a free starting path and frequent feature expansion should shortlist TradesViz.
pros: Free Basic plan for essential journaling and imports
Pro plan covers all asset type imports with advanced charts and filters
Platinum adds AI review, AI Q&A, simulators, options flow and 600+ statistics
Strong value for traders who want dense analytics
cons: Feature density can feel busy for simple journaling
Advanced analytics and simulators require paid plans
Cloud workflow may not suit traders who want local-only storage
meta_title: TradesViz Review 2026: Free Journal, Pro, Platinum
meta_description: TradesViz reviewed for free Basic journaling, Pro and Platinum pricing, imports, dashboards, AI review, simulators, options flow and alternatives.
alt_meta_description: Compare TradesViz alternatives for simpler journaling, AI review, replay, desktop storage, broker sync, pricing and active trader workflow fit.
